data: Learn how to ask for clarification politely at work

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to ask for clarification politely when instructions are unclear.

Asking for clarification shows that you want to do the job correctly.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a75c69e6-50e1-4b23-be38-3f49cad2620c-48.-Asking-for-Clarification-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When instructions are unclear at work, use this structure:

"Could you please clarify [instruction] so that I can [action]?"

For example: "Could you please clarify the approval process so that I can submit the form correctly?"
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a75c69e6-50e1-4b23-be38-3f49cad2620c-48.-Asking-for-Clarification-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If you need more details about a project deadline, you can say:

"Could you please clarify the deadline so that I can plan my work accordingly?"
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a75c69e6-50e1-4b23-be38-3f49cad2620c-48.-Asking-for-Clarification-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure helps you ask for clarity in a respectful and professional way.

It shows your manager that you want to complete the task correctly.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/a75c69e6-50e1-4b23-be38-3f49cad2620c-48.-Asking-for-Clarification-at-Work.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice asking for clarification at work!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to ask for clarification about a task

1.Could you please clarify the approval process so that I can submit the form correctly?
2.I do not understand this at all, can you explain everything again?

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to ask for clarification about a deadline

1.Could you please clarify the deadline so that I can plan my work accordingly?
2.When exactly do I have to finish this because the deadline is not clear?

Correct answer: 1
Could&&you&&please&&clarify the&&approval&&process so&&that I&&can submit&&the&&form correctly
Could&&you&&please&&clarify the&&project&&scope so&&that I&&can assign&&the&&tasks correctly
Could&&you&&please&&clarify the&&deadline so&&that I&&can plan&&my&&work accordingly
Could&&you&&please&&clarify the&&reporting&&format so&&that I&&can complete&&the&&document correctly
Could&&you&&please&&clarify the&&team&&structure so&&that I&&can coordinate&&with&&the&&right people

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your manager gives you an unclear task. How do you ask for clarification?'

'2. Your team leader explains a process but you did not understand one step. How do you ask for clarification?'

'3. Your supervisor sends an email with unclear instructions. How do you ask for clarification?'

'4. A colleague explains a new system but you are confused. How do you ask for clarification?'

'5. Your manager gives feedback that is not clear. How do you ask for clarification?'"
